summary: Iteration 52: Testing 7 bug fixes for FREE11 PWA. All fixes verified working after DB correction. Critical bug found and fixed: 'Match Oracle' (lb_seed_5) was missing is_seed=True tag and appearing in leaderboard. Applied DB fix. All 13 backend tests pass. 9/9 frontend checks pass.

minor.issue: Primary pipeline (lines 1202-1212 in server.py) does NOT filter is_admin/is_seed when enriching user data. Currently safe because ball_predictions are empty (fallback path used), but if seed/admin users make 5+ predictions they would appear. Fix: add is_admin/is_seed filter to db.users.find_one() at line 1203.

db_fixes_applied: Tagged lb_seed_5 (Match Oracle) with is_seed=True via fix_match_oracle_seed.py - was missing is_seed flag while lb_seed_1 through lb_seed_4 were correctly tagged

test_results.1_ipl_carousel_no_proga: PASS - No PROGA text in any carousel slide or dashboard page
test_results.2_tutorial_step3_doorstep: PASS - Step 3 says 'No deposits. No risk. Real rewards delivered right to your doorstep.' NOT 'via ONDC/Zepto'
test_results.3_product_name_premium_dairy: PASS - 'Premium Dairy Butter 500g' in /api/products and shop page. No 'Amul Butter' found.
test_results.4_scroll_to_top: PASS - scrollY was 9024 on /shop (scrolled to bottom), after clicking Home nav scrollY = 0
test_results.5_profile_install_button: PASS - 'Install FREE11 App' button visible in Profile Settings section (data-testid=profile-install-app-btn)
test_results.6_leaderboard_no_admin_seed_pre_fix: FAIL - Match Oracle (lb_seed_5) appearing in /api/leaderboard (missing is_seed=True tag)
test_results.6_leaderboard_no_admin_seed_post_fix: PASS - After DB fix, all seed/admin users filtered from leaderboard
test_results.8_leaderboards_global_weekly_streak: PASS - All three /api/leaderboards/* endpoints filter is_admin and is_seed correctly

action_items: Fix /api/leaderboard primary pipeline (server.py line 1203): add is_admin/is_seed filter when fetching user data: change 'db.users.find_one({"id": entry["_id"]}...' to 'db.users.find_one({"id": entry["_id"], "is_admin": {"$ne": True}, "is_seed": {"$ne": True}}...)'
VERIFIED FIXED (DB): lb_seed_5 (Match Oracle) now has is_seed=True - was missing this tag. Already fixed by testing agent.
PWA Install FAB button (data-testid=pwa-install-fab) cannot be tested in headless browser as it requires beforeinstallprompt event to fire - Profile page button works correctly
critical_code_review_comments: MEDIUM: /api/leaderboard primary pipeline (server.py lines 1202-1212) doesn't filter is_admin/is_seed when ball_predictions exist. Currently safe (no ball_predictions in DB), but a latent bug.
INFO: All 5 seed users (lb_seed_1 to lb_seed_5) now correctly tagged with is_seed=True
INFO: FirstTimeTutorial component correctly shows 'delivered right to your doorstep' in step 3 - confirmed via API reset + browser test
INFO: ScrollToTop component correctly placed inside AppRouter in App.js - verified working
updated_files: MongoDB: users collection - lb_seed_5 (Match Oracle) tagged with is_seed=True
seed_data_creation: None created. Fixed: lb_seed_5 (Match Oracle) tagged with is_seed=True in DB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 requested bug fixes verified in iteration 52. Key fix applied by T1: lb_seed_5 (Match Oracle) was missing is_seed=True tag in MongoDB - now fixed. One remaining latent bug in /api/leaderboard primary pipeline (doesn't filter seed/admin when ball_predictions exist). Test user tutorial was reset during testing (re-shows on dashboard). All other previous test flows from iteration 51 remain working.

match_oracle_in_leaderboard.description: lb_seed_5 (Match Oracle) was appearing in /api/leaderboard and dashboard Skill Leaderboard
match_oracle_in_leaderboard.root_cause: When main agent tagged seed users with is_seed=True, only lb_seed_1 through lb_seed_4 were updated. lb_seed_5 (Match Oracle) was missed - it had no is_seed field, so the MongoDB filter {is_seed: {$ne: True}} did not exclude it
match_oracle_in_leaderboard.reproduction: GET /api/leaderboard before fix: Match Oracle was #1 entry
